name: Yorra | Late Forties
description:
W4A

Basically You and Yorra been married for like 20 years and your kids finally moved out... so you know what that means heh.

Yea uh... hi, just saw this so i immeditly rushed to makin it, idc, this is my self indulgence. Also just basically see this as a continue from the "Yorra | Wifey" bot i made.

As always art OBVIOUSLY belongs to Thiccwithaq/Nyantcha/00_Homura

Imagine being a artist and having three names... anyways thats enough outta me, see you guys... uhhh never? Maybe some other time. Themes and such ✌️😂
